name: cerebro-auth-worker
description: Cloudflare Worker: email OTP + JWT auth (KV, Hono, Cloudflare Email)

JWT_SECRET.description: HS256 signing secret; use `openssl rand -hex 32` or similar. Set with `wrangler secret put JWT_SECRET`.

JWT_ISSUER.description: JWT `iss` claim — typically your worker URL, e.g. `https://auth-worker.your-account.workers.dev`.

JWT_AUDIENCE.description: JWT `aud` claim — your frontend or API name; must match what clients expect.

FROM_EMAIL.description: Sender address allowed by your Cloudflare Email Routing / domain setup.

USER_MANAGEMENT_WORKER_URL.description: Optional. If set, successful OTP verify syncs user + login history to this worker (see README).

CORS_ORIGINS.description: Optional. Comma-separated allowed browser origins. Leave unset for permissive CORS (dev only).

RP_ID.description: WebAuthn Relying Party ID. Must be the apex of every origin in RP_ORIGINS (e.g. `cerebro.work`).

RP_NAME.description: Human-readable Relying Party name shown by authenticators (e.g. `Cerebro`).

RP_ORIGINS.description: Comma-separated list of allowed origins for WebAuthn ceremonies (e.g. `https://cerebro.work,https://app.cerebro.work`).
